Park and restore your whole board in one keystroke, jot a note on any session, and get warned when an agent CLI drifts past what Atrium was tuned for. Plus a smoother, sturdier attach/detach.

## Highlights

- **Pause all / resume all.** `ctrl+p` parks every active session in view (commit WIP, detach, drop the worktree, keep the branch); `ctrl+r` restores every paused one. Both are count-confirmed, filter-aware, and continue past individual failures with a summary of what didn't make it. Before a reboot, "pause all" leaves nothing for crash-recovery to clean up; after one, "resume all" brings the board back without N manual resumes.
- **Per-session notes.** Attach an optional freeform note to any session — it shows on the session's list row. Edit it from the rename overlay, and pausing a session opens straight to its note so you can leave yourself a breadcrumb. Notes persist across restarts.
- **`atrium doctor` + drift guard.** Atrium's prompt/status detection is tuned against specific agent-CLI versions. The new `atrium doctor` subcommand prints a table of each installed agent versus the version its heuristics were verified against, and a one-time startup hint flags when an agent has drifted far enough that detection might be off. Acknowledge it and it stays quiet until it drifts again.

## Fixes

- **Smoother, race-free detach.** Detaching no longer flickers or feels sluggish — the background poll loop now stands down while a session is attached instead of contending with the live client, and a stray "terminated without detaching" error on a normal detach is gone.
- **Detach can't crash the TUI.** A pty failure during detach now degrades gracefully and surfaces an info modal, instead of panicking the whole app.
- **Clean pause/resume round-trips.** Resuming a session no longer leaves a stack of `[atrium] … (paused)` marker commits in your branch history, and sessions created from a chosen base branch keep their committed work across pause→resume (previously it could be silently discarded, including after a reboot-triggered pause).
- **Live permission-mode chip.** The per-session mode badge now tracks the agent's *current* mode (e.g. when you accept a plan-mode session into auto) instead of showing the launch-time flag forever.
- **Kill dialog warns on uncommitted work.** Killing a session with uncommitted changes now says so in the confirmation.

## Install

```bash
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ZviBaratz/atrium/main/install.sh | bash
```

Or with Go — note this builds from source and reports a `dev` version (the
script installs the version-stamped, self-updating release binary):

```bash
go install github.com/ZviBaratz/atrium@v0.7.0
```

This is a 0.x release — APIs and behavior may change.
